popularStory.headline: Sir Walter Devereux of Bodenham
popularStory.description:
Sir Walter Devereux of Bodenham was a prominent knight in Herefordshire during the reign of Edward III. He was a member of Parliament, sheriff, and Justice of the Peace for Hereford.

Ancestry and Chi …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Devereux於1261年出生時，他的父親Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux20歲，母親Alice De Grandison22歲。他與Margaret De Braose結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1375年被列為 sheriff of herefordshire。他去世於1320年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Devereux于1261年出生时，他的父亲Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux20岁，母亲Alice De Grandison22岁。他与Margaret De Braose结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1375年被列为 sheriff of herefordshire。他去世于1320年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Devereux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Devereux was born in 1261, his father, Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux, was 20 and his mother, Alice De Grandison, was 22. He married Margaret De Braose. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. In 1375, at the age of 114, his occupation is listed as  sheriff of herefordshire. He died after 1320.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Devereux est né en 1261, son père, Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alice De Grandison, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret De Braose. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. En 1375, à l’âge de 114 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est  sheriff of herefordshire. Il est décédé après 1320.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Devereux 1261 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux 20 und seine Mutter Alice De Grandison 22. Er hat Margaret De Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1375, als er 114 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als  sheriff of herefordshire aufgeführt. Er starb nach 1320.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Devereux è nato il nel 1261, il suo padre, Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Alice De Grandison, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret De Braose. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1375, all'età di 114 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come  sheriff of herefordshire. Morì dopo il 1320.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Devereuxが1261年に生まれた時，父Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereuxは20歳，母Alice De Grandisonは22歳であった。Margaret De Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1375年，114歳の時，職業は sheriff of herefordshireと記録されている。彼は1320年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Devereux(이)가 1261년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice De Grandison(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Margaret De Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1375년, 114세의 나이로 그의 직업은  sheriff of herefordshire이었다. 그는 1320년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Devereux nasceu em 1261, seu pai, Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Alice De Grandison, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret De Braose. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1375, com 114 anos, sua profissão aparece como  sheriff of herefordshire. Ele faleceu após 1320.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Devereux родился в 1261 г., его отцу по имени Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice De Grandison, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret De Braose. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1375 году, в возрасте 114 лет,  он работал по профессии  sheriff of herefordshire. Он умер после 1320 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Devereux nació en 1261, su papá, Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Alice De Grandison, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret De Braose. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1375, a la edad de 114 años, su ocupación registrada era  sheriff of herefordshire. Murió después de 1320.
